sourceMovie.title: X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time works as a documentary movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Hot Girls Wanted
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time clicked for you, Hot Girls Wanted (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in documentary, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time?
faq.answer: Try Hot Girls Wanted, Side by Side, Spielberg—each shares DNA with X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time?
faq.answer: X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time (2016) is best described as Documentary. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is X-Rated 2: The Greatest Adult Stars of All-Time part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "X-Rated Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
